rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex blocks within the appropriate AADL scope: component type for interface assumptions/guarantees, implementation for bindings.
Respect AADL scope boundaries: component type contracts reference type-level features, implementation contracts reference implementation-level subcomponents and connections.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture during AGREE fusion by placing contracts in valid scopes and avoiding structural changes.
Use only visible identifiers from the current AADL component scope in AGREE annexes.
Do not introduce package-qualified names or types not present in the analyzed model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and must be placed in valid AADL component type or implementation scopes.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes or vice versa; ensure scope alignment.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE syntax and annex placement rules
